# RISMFP UI archive

This repository is an independent frontend case study based on the historical Raising Incomes of Small and Medium Farmers Project website.

Important limitations:
- It is not an official Government of Nepal service.
- It is not operated by RISMFP or the Asian Development Bank.
- Historical contact details, figures, notices, and report titles may be outdated.
- Login, grant application, and document submission services are not provided.
- Missing source documents are labelled as unavailable.

Implementation:
- Static HTML
- Shared CSS
- Native JavaScript and Web Components
- GitHub Pages compatible

Repository:
https://github.com/Nischhalsubba/rismfp-ui
